code:
%%{Retail_CouponSystem}}}%%
stateDiagram-v2
title: SM-07.01 — Snapshot & KPI Aggregation (Retail_CouponSystem)

[Retail_CustomerLoyalty] --> SNAPSHOT_INIT : SnapshotStarted (Retail_OrderManagement)
note right of SNAPSHOT_INIT
  Initialize aggregation window:
  • wall-clock or governance-driven snapshot
  • bind ParamVersion (Retail_Inventory)
  • allocate run-id for auditability
end note

SNAPSHOT_INIT --> LOAD_INPUTS : WindowBound
note right of LOAD_INPUTS
  Fetch inputs from services:
  • PoC CP/W deltas (Retail_CouponSystem)
  • Resonance samples (Retail_CouponSystem)
  • Treasury payouts & reserves (Retail_CustomerLoyalty)
  • Governance decisions (Retail_PointOfSale)
  • Hub/project signals (Retail_CouponSystem)
end note

LOAD_INPUTS --> COMPUTE_FEATURES : InputsValidated
note right of COMPUTE_FEATURES
  Build feature store:
  • rolling sums / EMA / decay transforms
  • outlier clipping & normalization
  • join by canonical ids
end note

COMPUTE_FEATURES --> COMPUTE_SRI : FeaturesReady
note right of COMPUTE_SRI
  Compute Systemic Resonance Index (Retail_PointOfSale):
  • aggregate R across domains
  • weighting & alignment factors
  • produce SRI_t and deltas
end note

COMPUTE_SRI --> AGGREGATE_KPIS : SRIComputed (Retail_CouponSystem)
note right of AGGREGATE_KPIS
  Aggregate KPIs:
  • CP_i, W_i, project A_j, funding stats
  • coherence trends & alerts
end note

AGGREGATE_KPIS --> PUBLISH : KPIUpdated (Retail_CustomerLoyalty)
note right of PUBLISH
  Publish to:
  • UI (Retail_Inventory) — dashboards / heatmaps
  • Gov (Retail_Inventory) — decision support
  • Treasury (Retail_Inventory) — rebalancing
  • Ethics (Retail_PointOfSale) — coherence signals
end note

PUBLISH --> [Retail_PointOfSale] : SnapshotClosed

%% ---- Integrity / reconciliation paths ----
LOAD_INPUTS --> GAP_DETECTED : MissingInputs / HashMismatch
GAP_DETECTED --> RECONCILE : BackfillRequested
RECONCILE --> LOAD_INPUTS : BackfillCompleted

COMPUTE_FEATURES --> REVIEW : AnomalyDetected
REVIEW --> COMPUTE_FEATURES : ClearedByReview
REVIEW --> FAILED : IntegrityBreach

PUBLISH --> RETRY : PublishError
RETRY --> PUBLISH : PublishRetried

FAILED --> [Retail_PointOfSale] : SnapshotFailed

%% ===== Styling =====
classDef core fill:#ff8b00,stroke:#333,color:#fff,font-weight:bold;
class SNAPSHOT_INIT,LOAD_INPUTS,COMPUTE_FEATURES,COMPUTE_SRI,AGGREGATE_KPIS,PUBLISH,GAP_DETECTED,RECONCILE,REVIEW,RETRY,FAILED core;
repo_description: The cohersphere architecture — structural blueprint of the resonance network. Defines the modular layers connecting app, API, and governance protocols. Outlines data flows for Proof-of-Contribution, c

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为零售优惠券系统（Retail_CouponSystem）设计一个状态图，核心是快照与KPI聚合流程。起点是Retail_CustomerLoyalty触发快照，你觉得怎么展开？
明白了。我设想从Retail_CustomerLoyalty到SNAPSHOT_INIT的转换，标注为SnapshotStarted，并且关联Retail_OrderManagement。SNAPSHOT_INIT里需要描述初始化聚合窗口的逻辑。
对，初始化要包含wall-clock或治理驱动的快照触发，还要绑定ParamVersion（来自Retail_Inventory）和分配run-id用于审计。
已添加SNAPSHOT_INIT的右侧注释，包含这三项初始化内容。接下来是WindowBound转换到LOAD_INPUTS状态？
是的，LOAD_INPUTS需要拉取多个来源的数据：PoC的CP/W增量、Resonance样本来自Retail_CouponSystem本身，还有Retail_CustomerLoyalty的Treasury payouts和reserves。
我注意到Governance decisions来自Retail_PointOfSale，Hub/project signals又回到Retail_CouponSystem。这个交叉引用没问题吧？
没问题，治理决策确实由Retail_PointOfSale输出，而Hub信号是CouponSystem内部的项目聚合。继续吧。
LOAD_INPUTS的注释已完成，五项输入来源都已标注。下一步InputsValidated转换到COMPUTE_FEATURES，构建特征存储？
对，COMPUTE_FEATURES要做滚动求和、EMA、衰减变换，还有异常值裁剪和归一化，最后按canonical ids做join。
COMPUTE_FEATURES注释已添加。接下来FeaturesReady转换到COMPUTE_SRI，计算系统共振指数。
COMPUTE_SRI是核心计算，要聚合跨域的R值，应用weighting和alignment factors，输出SRI_t和deltas。这个状态关联Retail_PointOfSale。
确认一下，SRIComputed转换到AGGREGATE_KPIS，标注SRIComputed并关联Retail_CouponSystem，对吗？
正确。AGGREGATE_KPIS要汇总CP_i、W_i、project A_j、资金统计，还有coherence trends和alerts。
AGGREGATE_KPIS注释已完成。KPIUpdated转换到PUBLISH，关联Retail_CustomerLoyalty。
PUBLISH要分发到四个目的地：UI给Retail_Inventory做dashboards和heatmaps，Gov给Retail_Inventory做决策支持，Treasury给Retail_Inventory做rebalancing，Ethics给Retail_PointOfSale做coherence signals。
PUBLISH注释已添加四项输出。最后SnapshotClosed回到Retail_PointOfSale，主流程完成。
现在需要补充完整性路径。LOAD_INPUTS可能遇到MissingInputs或HashMismatch，要分支到GAP_DETECTED。
GAP_DETECTED之后是BackfillRequested转换到RECONCILE，然后BackfillCompleted回到LOAD_INPUTS，形成循环。
很好。另外COMPUTE_FEATURES如果发现异常，要走到REVIEW状态。
REVIEW有两个出口：ClearedByReview回到COMPUTE_FEATURES，或者IntegrityBreach走到FAILED。
对，FAILED最终SnapshotFailed回到Retail_PointOfSale。还有PUBLISH失败的情况？
PUBLISH遇到PublishError走到RETRY，然后PublishRetried回到PUBLISH。
等等，RETRY的状态定义我需要确认一下——它是独立状态还是只是转换标签？
RETRY是独立状态，和GAP_DETECTED、RECONCILE、REVIEW、FAILED一样，属于异常处理状态。
明白了。现在所有核心状态和转换都齐了。需要给这些关键状态加上统一样式。
已添加classDef core样式，填充色#ff8b00，深灰边框，白色加粗字体。应用到所有主流程状态和异常处理状态。
检查一下：AGGREGATE_KPIS的转换标注是SRIComputed关联Retail_CouponSystem，但PUBLISH的KPIUpdated关联Retail_CustomerLoyalty，这个数据源切换是正确的吗？
确认正确。SRI计算在CouponSystem内完成，但KPI更新事件是推送给CustomerLoyalty域的，符合业务逻辑。
标题定为SM-07.01 — Snapshot & KPI Aggregation (Retail_CouponSystem)，加上状态图版本stateDiagram-v2。
标题和版本已设置。完整图结构已构建，包含12个主要状态、15条转换路径、6条异常处理路径，所有注释和样式应用完毕。
最后确认一下end note的位置——每个状态的注释都在右侧，没有重叠？
所有note right of都正确放置，无重叠，阅读顺序清晰。图已完整。
很好，这个状态图覆盖了Retail_CouponSystem的快照聚合全流程，包括正常路径、数据缺口回补、异常审查和发布重试机制，可以定稿了。
